source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.3
distilled_thesis: The cave triad marks a condition against sterile self-saturation, implying that even light would grow sated without relation and return.
